name: Advanced Object-Oriented Programming
description: Master advanced OOP concepts in Python including magic methods, metaclasses, inheritance hierarchies, polymorphism, design patterns like Singleton, and class decorators for building sophisticated applications.

lessons.title: Magic Methods (Dunder Methods)
lessons.description: Learn how to use special methods to customize class behavior for built-in operations like arithmetic, comparisons, and container protocols.

lessons.title: Metaclasses
lessons.description: Understand how metaclasses control class creation and enable advanced patterns like Singleton, automatic registration, and API design.

lessons.title: Advanced Inheritance and MRO
lessons.description: Master method resolution order (MRO), super() usage, and complex inheritance hierarchies.

lessons.title: Polymorphism and Abstract Base Classes
lessons.description: Implement polymorphism using ABCs to create interfaces and enforce method implementation.

lessons.title: Singleton Pattern
lessons.description: Implement Singleton pattern using metaclasses, decorators, and __new__ methods to ensure single instance.

lessons.title: Class Decorators and Descriptors
lessons.description: Use class decorators to modify classes dynamically and descriptors for reusable attribute validation.
